_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and implementing data anonymization and pseudonymization techniques appropriate to the intended use, including k-anonymity, differential privacy, and synthetic data generation approaches.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-006 (RC, cosine: 0.430), SP-K-011 (SP, cosine: 0.419).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.9/10 (raw 0.694). Shared vocabulary: [skill, techniques]. DCWF-only terms [identifying, obfuscation] vs WIDAI-only terms [anonymity, anonymization, approaches, appropriate, data, designing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.888 (P=0.923, R=0.855). P exceeds R by 0.068 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Skill in identifying obfuscation techniques." and "Skill in designing and implementing data anonymization and pseudonymization tech" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.444 < STS 0.694 (gap -0.250). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [identifying, obfuscation] and [anonymity, anonymization, approaches] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [skill, techniques]. DCWF-only: [identifying, obfuscation]. WIDAI-only: [anonymity, anonymization, approaches, appropriate, data, designing].
